message:
feat(core): add 3 negative/boundary integration tests for replay capture pipeline (ft-og6q6.2.7)

Add malformed artifact rejection, unsupported schema version handling, and
empty fixture boundary tests to the replay capture integration suite. Total
suite now has 12 tests (9 existing + 3 new), all passing locally (55.83s)
and previously validated remotely via rch on vmi1152480.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
